title: Wizard async transfer webhook callback (CC3-898 / CC3-896)
description: JSON body POSTed by the ieee-rc-wizard-transfer Lambda to the Drupal callback_url given in the trigger. Signed with X-Webhook-Signature: hex(hmac_sha256(secret, raw_body)). Sent on terminal completion only (success or terminal failure after retries). This file MUST be byte-identical in Samson-Labs/ieee-cc and Samson-Labs/ieee-cc-python.

request_id.description: Echoed from the trigger; correlation ID.

status.description: Terminal outcome. There are no intermediate status updates.

error_code.description: Required when status=error. Discriminates retriable vs. terminal failure on the Drupal side. drive_token_expired => Drupal can mint a fresh token and resubmit; url_not_found / tls_error => terminal, surface to user; url_timeout / dest_write_failed / internal => Drupal may retry.

error_message.description: Required when status=error. Human-readable detail for logs and the wizard status page. Do NOT leak secrets, tokens, or signed URLs.

bytes_transferred.description: Required when status=complete. Total bytes streamed into S3 (post-decompression if Content-Encoding was applied).

s3_etag.description: Required when status=complete. ETag of the final S3 object (multipart ETags are NOT raw MD5 — Drupal must treat as opaque).

examples.error_message: Drive returned 401 Unauthorized; access token has expired or been revoked.
